summary: Phase 2 testing complete - WebSocket layer + bonus features (Settings, mobile sidebar, PWA). All 51 backend tests pass (40 Phase 1 + 11 Phase 2 WebSocket). Frontend features verified: PWA manifest/service-worker, Settings page, mobile hamburger/sidebar drawer, dark mode, all Phase 1 views. Fixed missing useRTEvent import in MessagesView.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: MessagesView.jsx was missing 'import { useRTEvent } from ../lib/realtime' - useRTEvent was used but not imported
WebSocket implementation is solid - WSManager handles connect/disconnect, presence broadcasts, and message routing correctly
Mobile sidebar drawer works correctly with hamburger toggle, Escape key close, backdrop click close, and navigation close
PWA assets (manifest.json, service-worker.js) are properly served and configured

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test users created during WebSocket testing with pattern test_ws_*@roundtable.app

seed_data_creation: Admin user pre-seeded, test users created via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 complete. WebSocket tests verify: connection auth (rejects without token, accepts with token), ping/pong, presence updates on connect, message broadcasts (table-scoped and direct), text broadcasts, walkie_ping broadcasts with hydrated fields, item_added broadcasts, user_updated broadcasts, referral_joined broadcasts. Frontend verified: PWA manifest/service-worker, Settings page (name/color/status/logout), mobile sidebar drawer (hamburger, Escape, backdrop, navigation close), all Phase 1 views still working.

backend_websocket.ws_auth: /api/ws rejects without token (HTTP 403 via ingress), accepts with ?token= query param
backend_websocket.ws_ready: On connect, server sends {type:'ready', user_id} and sets user status to 'online'
backend_websocket.ws_presence: On connect/disconnect, presence broadcast sent to contacts (table-mates)
backend_websocket.ws_message_table: POST /api/messages with table_id broadcasts {type:'message'} to table members
backend_websocket.ws_message_direct: POST /api/messages without table_id broadcasts to sender + recipient
backend_websocket.ws_walkie_ping: POST /api/walkie/ping sends {type:'walkie_ping', notification:{from_name, from_initials, from_color}} to target
backend_websocket.ws_referral_joined: POST /api/invites/join sends {type:'referral_joined', invitee_name, joined_total} to inviter

frontend_phase2.settings_page: /settings - edit name/color/status, save updates profile, sign out works
frontend_phase2.title_bar_settings: Settings cog icon between Bell and avatar
frontend_phase2.mobile_sidebar: Sidebar slides in from left with mobile-open class, backdrop appears

frontend_phase1_regression.portal: All 6 widgets present (Today's Schedule, Recent on Tables, My Tables, Quick Actions, Invites & Referrals, Notifications)
frontend_phase1_regression.table_view: Round table visualization, LIVE badge, members, shared items, events, table chat all working
frontend_phase1_regression.table_chat: Can send messages in table chat
frontend_phase1_regression.dark_mode: Theme toggle works, persists to localStorage

mocked_apis.walkie_audio: MOCKED - UI + beep only, no real audio streaming
mocked_apis.video_call: MOCKED - UI overlay only, no real WebRTC streams
